channel.title: Threadwit Studio — Teacher and Student Printables
channel.description: Teacher planners, student planners, classroom posters and academic printables from Threadwit Studio.

item.title: Back to School Bundle Printable
item.description: The complete back-to-school kit: a 4-page student planner (class schedule, assignment tracker, exam prep, semester goals), a homework tracker that keeps due dates in check, and a reading log for book challenges. 8 pages, endless school years. Instant download printable, A4 + US Letter.

item.title: Student Planner Printable
item.description: Everything a student actually needs, nothing extra. See your week at a glance with the class schedule, keep every assignment and due date in one tracker, walk into exams with a study plan, and keep your semester goals (and grade targets) where you can see them. Instant download printable, A4 + US Letter.

item.title: Teacher Planner Printable
item.description: Your classroom, organized on five clean pages. Plan the week and each lesson, track attendance and grades, and keep a professional log of every parent contact. Low-ink and undated — print a fresh set every school year. Works for the 2026/2027 school year — and every year after, because it's undated. Instant download printable, A4 + US Letter.

item.title: Homework Tracker Printable
item.description: Never lose track of an assignment again. A clean homework log for every subject and due date, plus a weekly plan that spreads the work across your week — so nothing piles up on Sunday night. Instant download printable, A4 + US Letter.
